claims.text: Energy companies play a transformative role in an inclusive energy transition.
claims.source_sentence: Energy companies play a transformative role in an inclusive energy transition.

claims.text: Our Sustainability Framework reflects material sustainability factors imperative for us to focus on and manage well, as we support Asia’s shift to a clean and responsible future.
claims.source_sentence: Our Sustainability Framework reflects material sustainability factors imperative for us to focus on and manage well, as we support Asia’s shift to a clean and responsible future.

claims.text: We acknowledge the scientific consensus that human activities have led to increased greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and its resulting impact on the planet.
claims.source_sentence: We acknowledge the scientific consensus that human activities have led to increased greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and its resulting impact on the planet.

claims.text: As an energy company, we face climate and environmental risks that could potentially impact our bottom line.
claims.source_sentence: As an energy company, we face climate and environmental risks that could potentially impact our bottom line.

claims.text: Conversely, we also have opportunities to drive the growth and development of low-carbon solutions to enable the global energy transition.
claims.source_sentence: Conversely, we also have opportunities to drive the growth and development of low-carbon solutions to enable the global energy transition.

claims.text: Our communities and employees enable the success of our business.
claims.source_sentence: Our communities and employees enable the success of our business.

claims.text: Uplifting communities helps build goodwill and promotes local development, while advancing the capabilities of our employees and partners supports our transformation and growth.
claims.source_sentence: Uplifting communities helps build goodwill and promotes local development, while advancing the capabilities of our employees and partners supports our transformation and growth.

claims.text: In today’s dynamic global and macroeconomic environment, we believe that a resilient business requires a robust framework that identifies, manages and mitigates current and emerging risks.
claims.source_sentence: In today’s dynamic global and macroeconomic environment, we believe that a resilient business requires a robust framework that identifies, manages and mitigates current and emerging risks.

claims.text: These risks include corruption, non-compliance with laws, as well as health and safety.
claims.source_sentence: These risks include corruption, non-compliance with laws, as well as health and safety.

claims.text: A resilient business undergirds our transformation plan and targets.
claims.source_sentence: A resilient business undergirds our transformation plan and targets.

claims.text: Our Sustainability Report has been prepared with reference to the Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) Universal Standards 2021, Singapore Exchange Limited (SGX) Listing Rules 711A and 711B, Practice Note 7.6 Sustainability Reporting Guide and SGX Core Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Metrics.
claims.source_sentence: Our Sustainability Report has been prepared with reference to the Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) Universal Standards 2021, Singapore Exchange Limited (SGX) Listing Rules 711A and 711B, Practice Note 7.6 Sustainability Reporting Guide and SGX Core Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Metrics.

claims.text: Our climate-related financial disclosures, which were mandatory with effect from financial year 2023, are guided by the recommendations of the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures (TCFD).
claims.source_sentence: Our climate-related financial disclosures, which were mandatory with effect from financial year 2023, are guided by the recommendations of the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures (TCFD).

claims.text: Our materiality assessment process takes guidance from the GRI Standards.
claims.source_sentence: Our materiality assessment process takes guidance from the GRI Standards.

claims.text: Our material sustainability factors are reviewed and approved by the Board of Directors annually.
claims.source_sentence: Our material sustainability factors are reviewed and approved by the Board of Directors annually.

claims.text: Stakeholder engagement and relationships are ongoing and dynamic, and closely tied to the context of our partnerships.
claims.source_sentence: Stakeholder engagement and relationships are ongoing and dynamic, and closely tied to the context of our partnerships.

claims.text: We first identified our key stakeholders and their relevant relationship holders within Sembcorp.
claims.source_sentence: We first identified our key stakeholders and their relevant relationship holders within Sembcorp.

claims.text: We then engaged with these relationship holders to capture insights into stakeholders’ sustainability priorities, concerns, and expectations.
claims.source_sentence: We then engaged with these relationship holders to capture insights into stakeholders’ sustainability priorities, concerns, and expectations.

claims.text: The responses were aggregated and analysed, and the results indicate that our current material factors and aspects found on pages 40 and 41 remain relevant and crucial to our businesses.
claims.source_sentence: The responses were aggregated and analysed, and the results indicate that our current material factors and aspects found on pages 40 and 41 remain relevant and crucial to our businesses.

claims.text: We will continue to monitor emerging aspects and trends identified through our stakeholder engagement process.
claims.source_sentence: We will continue to monitor emerging aspects and trends identified through our stakeholder engagement process.

claims.text: Our report provides information on Sembcorp and its subsidiaries and covers the period from January 1 to December 31, 2024.
claims.source_sentence: Our report provides information on Sembcorp and its subsidiaries and covers the period from January 1 to December 31, 2024.

claims.text: It excludes operations, joint ventures, partnerships and associates where Sembcorp does not have management and / or operational control, with the exception of GHG emissions data.
claims.source_sentence: It excludes operations, joint ventures, partnerships and associates where Sembcorp does not have management and / or operational control, with the exception of GHG emissions data.

claims.text: GHG emissions data are reported using the equity share approach and with reference to the GHG Protocol and relevant local regulatory guidelines.
claims.source_sentence: GHG emissions data are reported using the equity share approach and with reference to the GHG Protocol and relevant local regulatory guidelines.

claims.text: We have engaged DNV Business Assurance Singapore Pte. Ltd. (DNV) to undertake an independent limited assurance of the sustainability information in our report.
claims.source_sentence: We have engaged DNV Business Assurance Singapore Pte. Ltd. (DNV) to undertake an independent limited assurance of the sustainability information in our report.

claims.text: The United Nations (UN) Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) were adopted by the UN in 2015 as a global development framework that seeks to end poverty, protect the planet and bring about peace and prosperity.
claims.source_sentence: The United Nations (UN) Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) were adopted by the UN in 2015 as a global development framework that seeks to end poverty, protect the planet and bring about peace and prosperity.

claims.text: The scale and ambition of the SDGs mean they cannot be achieved by governments alone, and require the collective effort of businesses, organisations and society.
claims.source_sentence: The scale and ambition of the SDGs mean they cannot be achieved by governments alone, and require the collective effort of businesses, organisations and society.

claims.text: Sembcorp believes in playing its part to help meet these goals.
claims.source_sentence: Sembcorp believes in playing its part to help meet these goals.

claims.text: In line with our purpose to drive the energy transition, we have adopted SDG 7 (Affordable and Clean Energy) and SDG 13 (Climate Action) as our priority SDGs.
claims.source_sentence: In line with our purpose to drive the energy transition, we have adopted SDG 7 (Affordable and Clean Energy) and SDG 13 (Climate Action) as our priority SDGs.

claims.text: Our strategic targets support these SDGs.
claims.source_sentence: Our strategic targets support these SDGs.

claims.text: We recognise that the SDGs are a holistic framework for sustainable development and will continue to manage other relevant areas to maximise positive impacts while minimising negative impacts.
claims.source_sentence: We recognise that the SDGs are a holistic framework for sustainable development and will continue to manage other relevant areas to maximise positive impacts while minimising negative impacts.

claims.text: Sembcorp’s Board of Directors oversees the business affairs of the Group.
claims.source_sentence: Sembcorp’s Board of Directors oversees the business affairs of the Group.

claims.text: The board provides leadership on Sembcorp’s overall strategy, which takes into consideration its material sustainability factors.
claims.source_sentence: The board provides leadership on Sembcorp’s overall strategy, which takes into consideration its material sustainability factors.

claims.text: The following board committees provide oversight on sustainability and climate change matters:
claims.source_sentence: The following board committees provide oversight on sustainability and climate change matters:

claims.text: Executive Committee Provides oversight and supervision of the Group’s strategy and business affairs, including its Climate Action Plan
claims.source_sentence: Executive Committee Provides oversight and supervision of the Group’s strategy and business affairs, including its Climate Action Plan

claims.text: Audit Committee (AC) and Risk Committee (RC) Endorse the Group’s policies, guidelines and systems to manage risks including climate-related risks.
claims.source_sentence: Audit Committee (AC) and Risk Committee (RC) Endorse the Group’s policies, guidelines and systems to manage risks including climate-related risks.

claims.text: Report to the board on the adequacy and effectiveness of the Group’s internal controls and risk management systems
claims.source_sentence: Report to the board on the adequacy and effectiveness of the Group’s internal controls and risk management systems

claims.text: Executive Resource & Compensation Committee (ERCC) Assists the board in reviewing the remuneration framework and endorses key performance indicators (KPIs) of our key management personnel, including sustainability and climate-related indicators
claims.source_sentence: Executive Resource & Compensation Committee (ERCC) Assists the board in reviewing the remuneration framework and endorses key performance indicators (KPIs) of our key management personnel, including sustainability and climate-related indicators

claims.text: Sembcorp’s Senior Leadership Council (SLC) and Enterprise Risk Committee (ERC) provide strategic direction for managing sustainability-related matters.
claims.source_sentence: Sembcorp’s Senior Leadership Council (SLC) and Enterprise Risk Committee (ERC) provide strategic direction for managing sustainability-related matters.

claims.text: The committees are chaired by our Group CEO and comprise senior executives who are accountable for the management of Sembcorp’s material sustainability factors.
claims.source_sentence: The committees are chaired by our Group CEO and comprise senior executives who are accountable for the management of Sembcorp’s material sustainability factors.

claims.text: The SLC convenes twice a month, where sustainability-related performance and updates are presented regularly.
claims.source_sentence: The SLC convenes twice a month, where sustainability-related performance and updates are presented regularly.

claims.text: The ERC convenes quarterly, and climate-related risks are monitored as part of our ERC platform.
claims.source_sentence: The ERC convenes quarterly, and climate-related risks are monitored as part of our ERC platform.

claims.text: The Group Sustainability division leads the integration of sustainability matters for the company and reports to the group chief financial officer.
claims.source_sentence: The Group Sustainability division leads the integration of sustainability matters for the company and reports to the group chief financial officer.

claims.text: ESG KPIs are a part of the annual performance scorecard of our senior executives.
claims.source_sentence: ESG KPIs are a part of the annual performance scorecard of our senior executives.

claims.text: These include health and safety indicators, as well as environmental indicators such as GHG emissions intensity and gross installed renewable energy capacity.
claims.source_sentence: These include health and safety indicators, as well as environmental indicators such as GHG emissions intensity and gross installed renewable energy capacity.

claims.text: We participate in industry and trade associations that support the sustainability agenda.
claims.source_sentence: We participate in industry and trade associations that support the sustainability agenda.

claims.text: Our Group CEO serves as Vice Chair, Asia, World Energy Council.
claims.source_sentence: Our Group CEO serves as Vice Chair, Asia, World Energy Council.

claims.text: Participated in the revamped CDP 2024 questionnaire and submitted a non-scoring response.
claims.source_sentence: Participated in the revamped CDP 2024 questionnaire and submitted a non-scoring response.

claims.text: Our last CDP Climate Change score received in 2023 was a ‘B’
claims.source_sentence: Our last CDP Climate Change score received in 2023 was a ‘B’

claims.text: Received a rating of AA in the MSCI ESG Ratings1 assessment in 2024
claims.source_sentence: Received a rating of AA in the MSCI ESG Ratings1 assessment in 2024

claims.text: Sembcorp’s Board of Directors is collectively responsible for the long-term success of the company.
claims.source_sentence: Sembcorp’s Board of Directors is collectively responsible for the long-term success of the company.

claims.text: The board considers sustainability as part of its business and strategy.
claims.source_sentence: The board considers sustainability as part of its business and strategy.

claims.text: It has determined Sembcorp’s material ESG factors and exercises oversight in the management and monitoring of its material factors and priorities.
claims.source_sentence: It has determined Sembcorp’s material ESG factors and exercises oversight in the management and monitoring of its material factors and priorities.

claims.text: We welcome feedback on our sustainability factors and reporting at sustainability@sembcorp.com.
claims.source_sentence: We welcome feedback on our sustainability factors and reporting at sustainability@sembcorp.com.
